productionEpochPolicy.closeRule: An epoch closes only after all creation targets and its bounded refinement-and-pruning slice pass validation and publication.

legacyPlayableUpgrades.note: Legacy playable upgrades remain excluded from new-production creation counts.

lastCatalogUnit.result: Accepted 10 genuinely new natural-language kit contracts after six additional duplicate, catalog-overlap, or blurred-scope rejections; no implementation was created.

lastCreationUnit.result: Upgraded Next Ledge so Slipstream Launch and Cacheline High converge at Windglass Relay, banking 134 preserved speed or 175 cargo mastery before generic ascent resumes; production creation counts remain unchanged.

lastRefinementUnit.scope: Next Ledge first-swing branch release cue
lastRefinementUnit.result: Slipstream now exposes a buoyant mint glide window while Cacheline exposes a faster amber aftershock window through descriptor-authored tuning and existing swing, release, HUD, effect, light, atmosphere, camera, and synth owners.

lastCompletedUnit.scope: Next Ledge first-swing branch release feel refinement
lastCompletedUnit.result: The selected payoff recoil now resolves into one actionable branch cue: a mint glide for Slipstream or amber aftershock for Cacheline, using existing state and presentation owners without a new state, timer, control, event type, entity, or feedback owner.
lastCompletedUnit.validation: All 28 existing Next Ledge test entrypoints, affected JavaScript syntax checks, JSON, and diff checks passed. Playwright completed actual-input safe and shortcut routes through physical release and the original 134-speed / 175-cargo Windglass scores, repeated the complete safe loop after cleanup, proved failure, keyboard retry, and Advanced closed/open/closed, held 69 DOM nodes, one canvas, 76 descriptors, and 277 scene nodes, and reported zero console or page errors. Human View passed the first screen plus final mint and amber ready/release frames with diagnostics closed. The matched 60-tick warm-up plus 180-tick active performance window improved from 91.17 to 47.24 ms average tick, 10.97 to 21.17 measured FPS, and 132.50 to 65.10 ms p95; steady-state counts stayed bounded.
lastCompletedUnit.publication: Pending validated commit, fetch-before-push verification, and publication receipt; ProtoKits is unchanged and synchronized at 04d34f049f58ae359cf71d43466c429dac2a6d08.

exactNextUnit.goal: Let Windglass answer the branch release with a short mint float-settle or amber brake-settle on score, using the existing score event, camera, material, and cue owners without another state or control.
